title: Top three an unexpected achievement for Garden Route High learner
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS -  Iminathi Matshoba of Garden Route High School said she had not been expecting to make the school’s top three achievers for the matric exams.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - Iminathi Matshoba of Garden Route High School said she had not been expecting to make the school’s top three achievers for the matric exams."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Matshoba was the third highest achiever out of the school’s first intake of Grade 12s."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“It feels amazing,” she said.","html":"“It feels amazing,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"When asked how she achieved her results, she said: “It is all about consistency, hard work and aiming to be number one.”","html":"When asked how she achieved her results, she said: “It is all about consistency, hard work and aiming to be number one.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"With her matric year now behind her, Matshoba said she hopes to study law, but she has not decided where just yet.","html":"With her matric year now behind her, Matshoba said she hopes to study law, but she has not decided where just yet."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I am extremely grateful for the support from my teachers, family and school. This achievement shows that with hard work, discipline and belief in yourself, anything is possible,” she said.","html":"“I am extremely grateful for the support from my teachers, family and school. This achievement shows that with hard work, discipline and belief in yourself, anything is possible,” she said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her message to the Class of 2026: “Do not procrastinate. Work hard.”","html":"Her message to the Class of 2026: “Do not procrastinate. Work hard.”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Top three an unexpected achievement for Garden Route High learner
